declaration_kind.author: Reviewing Attorney
declaration_kind.basis: declaration of covenants, not a condominium — 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117 does not apply; authority is the declaration's own amendment clause

amending_party: the undersigned owners of lots in Casey J. Loe
declaration_name: Declaration of Covenants and Restrictions for Casey P. Noe
amendment_authority: Article XI, Section 2 of the Declaration (amendment by the written consent of the owners of two-thirds of the lots)
amended_provisions: Section 5 of the Declaration (Fences) is amended by adding the following sentence: "No fence within the front setback may exceed four (4) feet in height."
